pages.name: Home
pages.description: Homepage for the indoor climbing professional association, providing quick access to all major sections.
primary_functions: Provide clear entry points to Events, Membership, Resources, Gym Directory, Careers, Education, and Committees
Highlight featured workshops, competitions, articles, courses, and job postings
Offer a basic sitewide search or quick links to common user tasks

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'View all workshops' or a Workshops quick-task shortcut
Click 'View all competitions' or a Competitions quick-task shortcut
Click a featured workshop or competition card
Click a quick-task shortcut that searches articles (e.g., anchor-building resources)
Click a featured article card
Click a featured course section 'Browse all courses'
Click a featured course card
Click 'View all jobs' in the featured job postings block
Click a featured job posting card
Click 'Find a Gym' hero/button
Click 'View Membership Plans' CTA
Click 'Get Involved in Committees' CTA

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Home' link in the main header navigation
Accessed via 'Home' link in the footer navigation
User enters or bookmarks index.html directly

pages.name: Events Listing
pages.description: Unified listing of all workshops and competitions with rich filters and sorting.
primary_functions: Filter events by type (workshops or competitions), including specific workshop types like Lead Climbing Safety
Filter events by discipline (e.g., Bouldering), date range, location (state or near a city with radius), and price range
Sort events by criteria such as date (soonest first) and registration fee (low to high)
Display event cards with key details and links to the event detail page

incoming_params.description: Pre-selects the event type filter, e.g., 'workshops' or 'competitions'; also used by header shortcuts 'Workshops' and 'Competitions'.
Optional discipline prefilter, e.g., 'bouldering' when deep-linking to bouldering competitions.
Optional city value for location-based prefiltering of events.
Optional US state code (e.g., 'CO') for state-level event filtering.
Optional numeric radius in miles around the provided city for nearby events.
Initial sort option, e.g., 'date_soonest_first' or 'registration_fee_low_to_high'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on an event/workshop/competition card in the results list

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Events' header navigation link (optionally with event_type prefilter).
Accessed via 'Workshops' and 'Competitions' header links using event_type query parameter.
Accessed via 'Events' footer navigation link.
User opens a bookmarked or shared URL to events.html with optional query parameters.
Loaded with optional URL query parameters to pre-populate filters.

pages.name: Event Detail & Registration
pages.description: Detail page for an individual workshop or competition, including registration.
primary_functions: Show full event information including title, description, date and time, location, discipline, and pricing
Display specific workshop or competition metadata such as skill level, age categories, and available tiers
Provide a 'Register' or 'Register Participant' button that reveals an embedded registration form
Collect registration details such as participant name, email, membership ID, age category (e.g., Youth), and chosen registration tier
Support payment choice options such as 'Pay at Venue' when available and confirm successful registration

incoming_params.description: ID of the event to display; required to load full event details and registration options.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Events' or breadcrumb link to return to the events listing

access_methods.description: Accessed when the user follows a link with eventId query parameter.
User opens a bookmarked event detail URL containing eventId.

pages.name: Membership Plans & Pricing
pages.description: Overview and comparison of membership options for climbing professionals.
primary_functions: Display available membership plans, including the Professional Routesetter membership with pricing by term
Provide a 'Compare Plans' view or tab showing benefits and differences between membership types
Allow users to select a specific membership plan and term (e.g., 1-year Professional Routesetter under $120)
Allow configuration of billing options including an Auto-Renew toggle that can be turned on or off
Pass the selected plan, price, term, and auto-renew preference to the membership checkout page

incoming_params.description: Optional membership plan code to highlight when deep-linking from promotions or About page (e.g., 'professional_routesetter').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Continue' or 'Join Now' after choosing a membership plan, term, and auto-renew preference

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Membership' header navigation link.
Accessed via 'Membership' footer navigation link.
User visits a shared or bookmarked membership_plans.html URL, optionally with highlight_plan parameter.

pages.name: Membership Checkout
pages.description: Checkout and payment page for completing membership purchases.
primary_functions: Display a summary of the chosen membership plan, term, price, and auto-renew status
Collect required personal and billing information such as full name, email, and billing address (city, state, ZIP)
Provide payment options including Credit/Debit Card and capture card details securely
Submit the membership purchase and present a confirmation message or receipt

incoming_params.description: Selected membership plan ID to be purchased.
Selected term option ID (e.g., 1-year) for the chosen membership plan.
String representation of the auto-renew toggle state ('true' or 'false').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Return to Home' after a successful membership purchase confirmation

access_methods.description: Accessed after selecting a plan on the Membership Plans page, with plan and term parameters in the URL.
User opens membership_checkout.html with valid query parameters (e.g., from an email link).

pages.name: Articles Listing
pages.description: Searchable, filterable library of educational and technical articles.
primary_functions: Allow keyword search of articles (e.g., searching for 'anchor building')
Filter articles by skill level (e.g., Advanced) and publication date range (e.g., after January 1, 2023)
Sort articles by criteria such as Most Recent
Display article summaries and titles that link to the full article detail page

incoming_params.description: Initial search query string to populate the articles search bar.
Optional skill level prefilter, e.g., 'advanced'.
Optional ISO date string to limit results to articles published on or after this date.
Optional sort option, e.g., 'most_recent'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click an article title or 'Read more' link from the listing

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Resources' header navigation link.
Accessed indirectly via Resources-related CTAs or links from other pages.
User opens a bookmarked or shared articles.html URL with optional query parameters.
Loaded with optional URL query parameters to pre-populate search and filters.

pages.name: Article Detail
pages.description: Full content view for an individual article with bookmarking tools.
primary_functions: Display the full article content, including title, author, publication date, and skill level
Offer a 'Save to Reading List' or 'Bookmark' button to add the article to the user's saved articles
Provide navigation back to the articles listing or search results (e.g., via breadcrumbs or back link)
Surface related or recommended articles when relevant

incoming_params.description: ID of the article whose full content should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Articles' or breadcrumb link

access_methods.description: Accessed when user follows a link with articleId query parameter.
User visits a bookmarked article_detail URL containing articleId.

pages.name: Gym Directory
pages.description: Search and filter directory of indoor climbing gyms.
primary_functions: Allow users to search for gyms by location (e.g., city such as Denver, CO)
Filter gyms by distance/radius (e.g., within 20 miles) and amenities such as Youth Programs
Sort results by distance (closest first) or other useful criteria
Display gym cards with key information and links to individual gym detail pages

incoming_params.description: Optional location query (e.g., 'Denver, CO') to pre-populate the gym search field.
Optional numeric radius in miles around the provided location.
Optional flag ('true'/'false') to prefilter gyms to those offering youth programs.
Optional sort option (e.g., 'distance_closest_first').

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a gym card in the directory listing

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Gym Directory' header navigation link.
Accessed via 'Gym Directory' footer navigation link.
User navigates directly to gyms.html with optional query parameters.
Loaded with optional URL query parameters to pre-populate search criteria.

pages.name: Gym Detail
pages.description: Detail page for an individual gym, including programs and a favorites action.
primary_functions: Show detailed gym information including address, contact details, and available programs (e.g., youth climbing)
Allow the user to add the gym to a personal 'Favorite Gyms' list via an 'Add to Favorite Gyms' or 'Save' button
Provide links or directions back to the gym search results
Optionally surface related gyms or nearby facilities

incoming_params.description: ID of the gym whose details and programs should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Results' or 'Back to Gym Directory'

access_methods.description: Accessed via links that include a gymId query parameter.
User opens a saved gym detail URL containing gymId.

pages.name: Job Listings
pages.description: Job board listing roles for climbing professionals.
primary_functions: Filter jobs by role (e.g., Head Routesetter), region (e.g., Pacific), and minimum salary (e.g., at least 55,000)
Sort job results by criteria such as Posted - Newest First
Display job cards with basic details like title, location, salary range, and posting date
Link to the full job detail and application page for each listing

incoming_params.description: Optional job role prefilter, e.g., 'head_routesetter'.
Optional region prefilter, e.g., 'pacific'.
Optional minimum salary filter value.
Optional salary unit (e.g., 'per_year').
Optional sort option, e.g., 'posted_newest_first'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a job card in the job listings

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Careers' header navigation link.
Accessed via 'Job Board' footer navigation link.
User opens a bookmarked jobs.html URL with optional filters.
Loaded with optional query parameters to pre-populate job filters.

pages.name: Job Detail & Application
pages.description: Detail and application page for an individual job posting.
primary_functions: Show complete job information including responsibilities, requirements, location, region, and salary
Provide an 'Apply with Saved Profile' button distinct from upload-based options
Present an application form or modal where the user can choose a saved profile (e.g., 'Default Professional Profile')
Submit the application and confirm successful submission to the employer or association

incoming_params.description: ID of the job posting to display and apply to.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Job Listings' or breadcrumb link

access_methods.description: Accessed via links that include a jobPostingId query parameter.
User opens a saved job detail URL containing jobPostingId.

pages.name: Courses Listing
pages.description: Catalog of educational and coaching courses offered by the association.
primary_functions: Filter courses by level (e.g., Intermediate), duration (e.g., up to 8 weeks), and rating (e.g., 4.5 stars and up)
Sort courses by rating (high to low) or other relevant criteria
Display course cards showing title, rating, duration, format, and key details
Link to the course detail page for more information and enrollment

incoming_params.description: Optional course level prefilter, e.g., 'intermediate'.
Optional maximum duration in weeks for prefiltering courses.
Optional minimum rating threshold (e.g., 4.5).
Optional course category, e.g., 'coaching' or 'routesetting'.
Optional sort parameter, e.g., 'rating_high_to_low'.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click a course card in the courses listing

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Education' header navigation link.
Accessed via 'Courses' footer navigation link.
User opens courses.html with optional filter query parameters.
Loaded with optional query parameters to initialize filters and sorting.

pages.name: Course Detail & Enrollment
pages.description: Detail and enrollment page for a specific course.
primary_functions: Display comprehensive course information including syllabus, duration, level, rating, and available formats
Provide an 'Enroll' button and allow selection of format when applicable (e.g., Self-paced)
Confirm enrollment and present a post-enrollment state or message
Offer an 'Add to My Learning Plan' or 'Save to Learning Plan' button to include the course in the user's learning plan

incoming_params.description: ID of the course to display and optionally enroll in.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Courses' or breadcrumb link

access_methods.description: Accessed via links that include a courseId query parameter.
User opens a saved course detail URL with courseId.

pages.name: Committees & Volunteering
pages.description: Listing of association committees and volunteer opportunities.
primary_functions: Filter committees by category (e.g., Safety Standards), meeting format (e.g., Online/Virtual), and meeting time (e.g., Evenings)
Display committee summaries including purpose, meeting cadence, and basic requirements
Provide links to individual committee detail pages for more information
Encourage involvement with clear calls to action to view and volunteer for committees

incoming_params.description: Optional committee category prefilter, e.g., 'safety_standards'.
Optional meeting format prefilter, e.g., 'online'.
Optional meeting time prefilter, e.g., 'evenings'.
Optional flag ('true'/'false') to show only committees currently accepting volunteers.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click on a committee card in the listing

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Committees & Volunteering' header navigation link.
Accessed via 'Committees & Volunteering' footer navigation link.
User opens committees.html with optional filter parameters.
Loaded with optional query parameters to initialize committee filters.

pages.name: Committee Detail & Volunteer Form
pages.description: Detail page for a specific committee, with a volunteer interest form.
primary_functions: Show detailed information about the committee, including scope, responsibilities, meeting schedule, and format
Provide a 'Volunteer' or 'Express Interest' button that reveals a volunteer sign-up form
Collect necessary information such as name, email, and areas of interest (multi-select with at least two choices)
Submit the volunteer interest form and confirm receipt to the user

incoming_params.description: ID of the committee whose details and volunteer form should be displayed.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Back to Committees' or breadcrumb link

access_methods.description: Accessed via links that include a committeeId query parameter.
User opens a saved committee detail URL containing committeeId.

pages.name: About the Association
pages.description: Overview of the indoor climbing professional association and its mission.
primary_functions: Explain the associations mission, vision, and role in indoor climbing safety and professionalism
Highlight key programs such as membership, education, events, and safety standards committees
Provide links to get involved, including Membership, Courses, Events, and Committees & Volunteering
Offer a clear route to the contact page for further inquiries

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Become a Member' or similar CTA in the Membership program section
Click 'Explore Education & Courses' CTA
Click 'View Events & Workshops' CTA
Click 'Safety Standards Committees' CTA
Click 'Contact Us' link from About page content

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'About' header navigation link.
Accessed via 'About the Association' footer navigation link.
User opens about.html directly.

pages.name: Contact
pages.description: Contact page for reaching the association with questions or feedback.
primary_functions: Provide a contact form to submit general inquiries, feedback, or support requests
Display direct contact details such as email address, mailing address, and phone number if applicable
Offer quick links back to high-value sections like Membership, Events, and Gym Directory for self-service

incoming_params.description: Optional preselected support topic, e.g., 'membership_support' or 'event_registration', to tailor the contact form.

outgoing_connections.trigger: Click 'Return to Home' after submitting a contact request
Click quick link to Membership from the self-service section
Click quick link to Events from the self-service section
Click quick link to Gym Directory from the self-service section

access_methods.description: Accessed via 'Contact' footer navigation link.
User opens contact.html directly, optionally with a topic query parameter.
Loaded with optional topic query parameter to pre-select a support topic.

header_links.description: Filter events to show workshops only
Filter events to show competitions only
Learn about the indoor climbing association

footer_links.description: Browse and apply for climbing jobs
Find safety standards and other committees
Contact the association for support or questions
